methods.name: Voice-Teeth Multimodal Authentication
methods.description: Multimodal biometric authentication scheme that combines voice features with teeth image characteristics captured simultaneously.

authenticator.name: Voice acoustic features and teeth visual characteristics

sources: @article{kimMultimodalBiometricAuthentication2008, title = {Multimodal Biometric Authentication Using Teeth Image and Voice in Mobile Environment}, author = {Kim, Dong-Su and Hong, Kwang-Seok}, year = {2008}, month = nov, journal = {IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics}, volume = {54}, number = {4}, pages = {1790--1797}, issn = {1558-4127}, doi = {10.1109/TCE.2008.4711236}}
